text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Summer camp with Biwa Hayahide commences.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket and Narita Taishin are here too,
and they run into us right as we're unloading our
luggage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All three of them are fired up about the Kikuka
Sho, so it's time to let the summer of friendly
rivalry begin!
